prompt:
A friendly tutorial desk scene showing a tablet or slim laptop with a stylized quest flow diagram on the screen made of icons and arrows rather than readable text, alongside a few printed cards laid out in a simple sequence: dialogue bubble icon, real-world object icon, safety shield icon, and a checkmark. A mug and a small potted plant sit nearby, making the scene feel welcoming and instructive without being cluttered.

Near-future solarpunk aesthetic with warm ambient lighting, clean lines, and natural materials. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos, and no legible text anywhere on screens or papers. Any human presence is limited to a partial hand pointing at one of the cards. The composition should clearly evoke "how quests work" in a playful, approachable way.
